changes.title: Neon Design Overhaul
changes.description: Complete visual redesign with neon aesthetic - hot pink title, cyan accents, and glowing effects.

changes.title: Venue Filter Chips
changes.description: Added filter chips for VEGA, JAZZ, DR KON venues with smooth animations.

changes.title: 3D Pixel Buttons
changes.description: New 3D-style pixel block buttons for ticket purchases with hover effects.

changes.title: Improved Loading States
changes.description: Enhanced skeleton loaders with neon shimmer effects.

changes.title: PWA Update Notifications
changes.description: Automatic update notifications when new version is available.
